headline: Columbus McKinnon to Present at Upcoming J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference and Sidoti Small Cap Conference
summary: Columbus McKinnon Corporation (Nasdaq: CMCO) ("Columbus McKinnon" or the "Company"), today announced that it will present at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on March 17, 2026, at approximately 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The Company will also present at the Sidoti Small Cap Conference on March 19, 2026, at approximately 12:15 p.m. Eastern Time.

headline: Tracking the gold trade: 3 reasons Wall Street is still bullish
summary: Gold (GC=F) prices have been volatile this week due to impacts from the Iran war, but overall, the precious metal has rallied over the past few years as investors continue to seek safety amid increased uncertainty. Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman tracks the precious metal's biggest milestones over the past several years, while Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré takes a look at recent calls on gold from firms like JPMorgan (JPM), Goldman Sachs (GS), and Wells Fargo (WFC), explaining why Wall Street is still so bullish on the commodity. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

headline: How JPMorgan’s New Target Is Shaping The Evolving Story At Inchcape (LSE:INCH)
summary: JPMorgan has lifted its price target for Inchcape to £8.80, giving investors an updated reference point for what the shares might be worth under refreshed assumptions. Bullish and cautious analysts alike are using this new target to frame a debate around how the latest inputs affect perceived risk and reward. headline: Asian Investors Repositioning Portfolios, JPMorgan's Craig Says
summary: Kerry Craig of JPMorgan Asset Management says Asian markets are experiencing continued repositioning by investors. He sees the moves as driven by rotation within portfolios rather than thinking about "a big flight away from risk assets at the moment."
